history.qwen_observation: Recipe validation failed because parameterized recipes were passed as colon-delimited strings instead of JSON objects with 'name' and parameter fields.
history.qwen_rationale: OpenRewrite's declarative recipe format requires parameterized recipes to be expressed as mappings with a 'name' key and explicit parameter keys. Fixing the lombok_safe_bump step to use proper JSON object syntax will allow the recipe to initialize and run, enabling the Spring Boot 2.0 -> 2.7 -> 3.3 -> Java 21 migration path to proceed.
